data.revised_prompt: Clean HD 2D game enemy concept for a cultivation roguelite: a standard non-chibi common melee enemy, demonic armored foot soldier with compact but normal proportions. Full body visible in a centered three-quarter RPG combat view, clear feet anchor, generous padding, subject occupies about 62% of the canvas. Hostile idle combat stance. Dark charcoal-black and muted steel forged armor, clawed gauntlets or a short blade, short torn cloth tabard, one or two clear electric-blue lightning cracks integrated into the armor or body, restrained cool rim light and subtle electric glow. Simplified normal-style direction, crisp readable silhouette, reduced ornament complexity, polished fantasy RPG asset, hand-painted 2D, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Flat solid chroma-key background ONLY, perfect uniform #FF00FF with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, or lighting variation. Single enemy only, no scene, no UI, no text, no watermark, no giant VFX, no huge cape, no clutter, no comedy. Avoid magenta in the subject.
